projectDescription: Open-source Agent Operating System built in Rust for autonomous AI agents
keyFeatures: Autonomous Hands - 7 pre-built capability packages that run independently on schedules
16-layer security system with WASM sandbox, Merkle audit trail, and SSRF protection
40 channel adapters for connecting agents to messaging platforms
27 LLM providers with 123+ models and intelligent routing
Model Context Protocol (MCP) client and server support
OpenFang Protocol (OFP) for P2P agent networking with HMAC-SHA256 auth
60 bundled skills with FangHub/ClawHub marketplace integration
SQLite memory substrate with vector embeddings and knowledge graphs
Desktop app with Tauri 2.0 and system tray integration
publicApiSurface: openfang init - Initialize configuration
openfang start - Start the daemon
openfang agent spawn <template> - Spawn a new agent
openfang agent chat <name> - Chat with an agent
openfang hand activate <name> - Activate autonomous Hand
openfang workflow create/run - Manage workflows
openfang skill install/list - Manage skills
openfang channel setup/enable - Configure channels
openfang migrate --from openclaw - Migration from OpenClaw
REST API: POST /api/agents/{id}/message - Send message to agent
REST API: GET /api/agents - List all agents
REST API: POST /v1/chat/completions - OpenAI-compatible endpoint
REST API: GET /api/models - List available models
REST API: POST /api/workflows/{id}/run - Execute workflow
WebSocket: /ws - Real-time agent chat streaming
Rust crate: openfang-kernel - Core orchestration kernel
Rust crate: openfang-runtime - Agent execution engine
Rust crate: openfang-api - HTTP API server
Rust crate: openfang-channels - 40 channel adapters
Rust crate: openfang-memory - SQLite memory substrate
